---
description: Implement a backlog/spec item with tests and documentation.
agent: implementer
---
Implement the requested backlog/spec item.

Mandatory sequence:
1. Read `AGENTS.md`, current focus, backlog and owner docs.
2. Inspect existing code/tests before editing.
3. Implement the smallest safe change.
4. Add/update tests.
5. Update affected docs.
6. Run validation and report exact commands/results.

Do not stop at partial completion unless blocked by missing information or a failing external dependency.
